== Bloominglabs Group Projects ==
*[[Bloominglabs side-lit LED sign]]
* [[Old-RFID access control]] - this was our first attempt at an RFID system for our room (back at the Collaboration Room) and the building
* [[Amateur Radio]] use at the space (aka Ham Radio)
* [[MAME Cabinet]] ('nuff said)
* [[Digital Badges]] - Achievement unlocked!
* [[Sunverge|Sunverge Energy computer donation]]
* [[PrintrBot]] 3d printer
* [[Engage 10]] uWrite Screens
* [[Open-HVAC-Control|Open HVAC Control]]
* [[Can-hacking]]
* [[AVR]] Page (robotics club code that we have used in testing AVR)
* [http://embeddeddreams.com/site/2009/07/29/eduino/ EDuino-B] Arduino clones

== Potential projects ==
* design and build, and (market?) a bathroom monitor. [[BloomingLabs Bathroom Minder]]
* build a [http://www.instructables.com/id/A-Word-Clock/ word clock]
* [http://instruct1.cit.cornell.edu/courses/ee476/FinalProjects/ Cornell AVR Projects Page]
